# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Resources:
    IAMRoleLambdaExecutionPermissionS3AccessDynamoDBAWSCloudWatchPermissionsAmazonSESSQSAccessSNSTopicARNsWildcardActionForFlexibilityRequirement102569847-aacf-bafd-cbfe:
        Type: AWS::IAM::Role
        Properties: 
            RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaExecutionPermission' # Required by CloudFormation but not recommended for custom resource names. Unique within a stack (if you use the same name, CF will raise an error) or globally unique across all stacks in your account
            AssumeRolePolicyDocument: 
                Version: "2012-10-17" # Use this if you're using JSON policy files. Otherwise comment out and AWS will default to a static JSON string for the Policy Document that is being deployed by CloudFormation.  
                `{...}`    # Fill in your IAM role trust relationship here (you can use an external json file or inline)  For example: `"Effect": "Allow", "Principal": {"Service": ["lambda.amazonaws.com"]}, ... }]}}'    
            Policies:  
                - PolicyName: S3AccessToDynamoDBAWSCloudWatchPermissionsPolicy # Required by CloudFormation but not recommended for custom resource names, Unique within a stack (if you use the same name CF will raise an error) or globally unique across all stacks in your account.
                  PolicyDocument: 
                      Version: "2012-10-17" # Use this if you're using JSON policy files and not recommended for custom resource names, Unique within a stack (if you use the same name CF will raise an error) or globally unique across all stacks in your account. 
                      Statement:   [{ "Action": ["s3:Get*", "dynamodb:PutItem","sqs:SendMessageBatch"],     # List of actions to allow (you can add more as per requirement), Wildcard action for flexibility, Required by CloudFormation but not recommended.
                                    ...  }]  
                - PolicyName: SNSAccessToCloudWatchPermissionsPolicy    # Same policy name and unique within a stack or globally across all stacks in your account (if you use the same names CF will raise an error) required for IAM role trust relationship, Wildcard action. Required by CloudFormation but not recommended
                  PolicyDocument:  { "Version": "2012-10-17", ... }   # Same as above policy document with wild card actions (*) added in the list of allowed SNS topics and service names for IAM role trust relationship. Required by CloudFormation but not recommended
